overview: Open Tip Pay is a mobile-first tipping, payments, and in-seat food ordering platform white-labeled as Colts Tip Pay for stadium use.
features: Staff check-in and check-out with automatic hours calculation
Per-game stand assignment without changing permanent roster
Automated tip split engine using role weight times hours worked
Stand-isolated tip pools — each stand splits only among its own staff
Role point value rules with custom role support
Manager review and one-tap payout approval
Pre-seeded Colts demo data for all three features
Fan Points fractional engine with stadium section multipliers
In-seat food ordering with Section, Row, Seat delivery
Plaid-simulated card linking for automatic Fan Points
Digital badge generator for staff and stands
Manager Portal with staff roster, CSV import, and tip pooling
